0.details:
my relationship with the person im celebrating
a  fun or meaningful memories i share with them
number of years we have known each other
how i spend my time with them
0.model_generation:
From the moment we first met ten years ago at that summer concert, I knew my life was about to change. Over the past decade, we’ve shared so many adventures—late-night road trips, spontaneous weekend hikes, and countless hours laughing over burnt pancakes during our Sunday morning cooking experiments. I remember the time we danced barefoot in the rain on that quiet street, completely forgetting the world, wrapped only in each other’s laughter.

Your kindness, your confidence, and your unwavering belief in me have made me a better person. Whether we’re curled up watching our favorite films, exploring new trails, or simply talking until dawn, every moment with you feels like home. Today, I promise to celebrate your strengths, support your dreams, and hold your hand through every challenge life brings. I vow to keep making memories that fill our hearts with joy and to love you more deeply with each passing day.

1.details:
start with a clear  and straightforward apology
what to fix to make our relationship better
how i will make amends
take responsibility and end positively
show empathy and acknowledge what happened
1.model_generation: I am truly sorry for my behavior last week during our disagreement. I realize that my tone and choice of words caused you pain, and I deeply regret how I reacted. I understand how hurtful it must have felt when I dismissed your feelings and interrupted you. To rebuild our trust, I will focus on listening actively and speaking with kindness, ensuring we both feel heard and respected. I will make amends by setting aside dedicated time each week to talk openly and check in on how you’re doing. I take full responsibility for my actions and apologize without excuses. Your feelings matter to me, and I am committed to showing empathy and understanding in every interaction. Please know I am listening. Thank you for your patience and willingness to work through this with me. I value our relationship more than anything, and I look forward to moving forward together.
1.final_version: I am truly sorry for my behaviour last week during our little disagreement. I realise that my tone and choice of words caused you pain, and I deeply regret how I reacted. I understand how hurtful it must have felt when I dismissed your feelings and interrupted you. To rebuild our trust, I will focus on listening actively and speaking with kindness, ensuring we both feel heard and respected. I will make amends by setting aside dedicated time each week to talk openly and check in on how you’re doing. I take full responsibility for my actions and apologize without excuses. Your feelings matter to me, and I am committed to showing empathy and understanding in every interaction. Please know I am listening. Thank you for your patience and willingness to work through this with me. I value our relationship more than anything, and I look forward to moving forward together.

2.details:
a warm greeting and acknowledge the time spent apart
share whats new with your life and ask about them
include a memory shared with then or a shared connection
suggest reconnecting
2.model_generation:
Hello!  
I hope you’re doing well. It’s hard to believe how quickly time has flown since we last chatted. Over the past few months, I’ve started a new role at GreenLeaf Marketing and taken up weekend hiking. My dog, Luna, especially enjoys our early morning trail walks. I often think back to our summer camping trip by Lake Mendocino—those late-night stargazing sessions still make me smile.  

What’s new with you? I’d love to hear about your art classes and how the new apartment is shaping up. It would be great to catch up on everything that’s been happening in our lives. If you’re free sometime next week, maybe we could grab a cup of coffee or hop on a video call. Let me know what works best for your schedule. Looking forward to reconnecting soon.  

Warmly,  
your friend
2.final_version:

With love

3.details:
a personal opening and a short love story or reflection of how we met
specific quantities you admire and your promise (the vows themselves)
a personal or lighthearted touch
a heartfelt closing
3.model_generation:
From the moment our eyes met over coffee that chilly autumn afternoon, I knew my life had changed forever. I remember your shy smile as you offered me a seat and the warmth I felt in your presence.

In you I found boundless kindness, infectious laughter, and unwavering curiosity. I promise to honor your dreams, champion your passions, and be your rock. I vow to listen with patience, speak with honesty, and celebrate every triumph, big or small. I pledge to share your joys, comfort your worries, and grow with you through every chapter.

I promise to let you control the TV remote sometimes, to taste each of your kitchen experiments, and to keep dancing with you in the kitchen, even when we step on each other’s toes.

Today, surrounded by our friends and family, I give you my whole heart. You are my love, my laughter, and my home, now and always.

4.details:
a warm gentle opening and acknowledge the person who passed
share personal memory or reflection
offer support or comfort and prayers
close with compassion and warmth and sending love and strength
4.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I was deeply saddened to learn of the passing of your beloved mother. Her kindness and warm smile made every gathering feel brighter. I’ll always treasure the afternoon we spent together in the garden, when she shared her favorite recipes and told stories that brought laughter to us all. Her love for life and generous heart will never be forgotten. Her generosity of spirit touched everyone she met, and her memory will continue to inspire us.

Please know that you are not alone during this difficult time. I am holding you close in my thoughts and prayers, and I am here for anything you may need—whether a listening ear, a comforting meal, or simply a moment of quiet companionship. May you find peace in the memories you shared and strength in the love that surrounds you.

With heartfelt sympathy, love, and strength,
4.final_version:
Dear friend ,

i was deeply saddened to hear of  the passing of your loved one . she brought so much light, love  and kindness to everyone who was around and knew her , her warm presence could lift even the heaviest of days.
 ill always cherish the afternoon we spent together in the garden last spring , when her laughter warmed even the rainiest day. she had a gentle way of making ordinary moments to feel extraordinary and taught me the value of compassion.

please know that my thoughts and prayers are with you and and your family during this difficult  time. if there is anything or any way i can support you whether a listening ear , bringing meals, or simply sitting quietly together - please dont hesitate to reach out im one phone call away,

may you find comfort in the memories you shared and strength in the love that surrounds you
 with love and strength

5.details:
a warm greeting and start with thanks
be specific about what youre thanking
share how it made you feel or the impact and mention future connection or goodwill
close warmly with love
5.model_generation:
Dear Emily,

Thank you so much for hosting last weekend’s dinner party and for the delicious meal you prepared. Your warm hospitality and attention to detail made the entire evening truly special. I especially loved the homemade lemon tart and the beautiful floral centerpiece—it added such a lovely touch and made me feel right at home. Sharing laughter and stories around your inviting table reminded me how grateful I am for friends like you. Your kindness and generosity meant the world to me and left me with wonderful memories to cherish. The cozy atmosphere and lively conversations lifted my spirits.

I’m already looking forward to our next get-together and hope we can plan a cozy brunch soon. Please let me know when you’re free, and I’ll gladly bring coffee and pastries. Thank you again for everything you did to make the evening so memorable.

With love,
Anna
